title: Biologics Contamination Finding
source: synthetic (inspired by FDA biologics contamination enforcement actions and ICH Q5A viral safety)
description: Biologics manufacturing facility identified adventitious viral contamination in upstream cell culture. Mycoplasma testing also revealed positive results in 2 of 8 production bioreactors. Product from affected lots was quarantined pending investigation.

claims.claim_text: Adventitious agent testing detected murine minute virus (MMV) contamination in CHO cell culture harvest from 2000L production bioreactor B3
Mycoplasma testing by qPCR and culture method showed positive results in bioreactors B3 and B5, affecting 4 production lots of anti-TNF mAb drug substance
Viral clearance validation study demonstrated only 2.8 log reduction for MMV across the downstream purification process, below the 4 log target per ICH Q5A
Environmental monitoring program did not include viral testing of raw materials and single-use components as recommended by PDA TR-47
Facility's contamination response SOP was last revised in 2019 and did not include provisions for adventitious virus events in single-use bioreactor systems
All affected product lots were quarantined within 24 hours of initial detection and have not been released for distribution
